Class DefaultCrossReferenceSourceInfo

java.lang.Object
recoder.AbstractService
recoder.service.DefaultProgramModelInfo
recoder.service.DefaultSourceInfo
recoder.service.DefaultCrossReferenceSourceInfo
All Implemented Interfaces:
Formats, Service, ChangeHistoryListener, CrossReferenceSourceInfo, ProgramModelInfo, SourceInfo, TuningParameters
Direct Known Subclasses:
KeYCrossReferenceSourceInfo
public class DefaultCrossReferenceSourceInfo extends DefaultSourceInfo implements CrossReferenceSourceInfo
Implements queries for cross referencing.

    • getReferences

      public List<MemberReference> getReferences(Method m)
      Retrieves the list of references to a given method (or constructor). The references stem from all known compilation units.
      Specified by:
      getReferences in interface CrossReferenceSourceInfo
      Parameters:
      m - a method.
      Returns:
      a possibly empty list of references to the given method.

    • getReferences

      Returns:
      a possibly empty list of references to the given constructor.
